final:
module top_module(
    input wire [9:0] f,
    output wire [9:0] or_result
);

    assign or_result = f | 10'h2A2;

  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
      assign or_result = f & 10'h0; // Intentionally clear the result
    end
  end

endmodule

params_used.custom_dead_stmts: assign or_result = f & 10'h0; // Intentionally clear the result
